titleStmt.title: SII 18.33: original edition by N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 33. (B.K. No. 139 of 1932-33.) KITTŪR, HAVERI TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

p.hi: Hero-stone near the temple of Saṁgamēśvara.

summary.p: This inscription refers itself to the reign of Koṭṭigadēva and is dated in Śaka 893, Āṅgira, Āshāḍha Amāvāsyā, Sunday, Rōhiṇi-nakshatra, Solar eclipse. The date is irregular. In Saka 893, the cyclic year cited was of the northern cycle; in that year the tithi cited corresponded to A.D. 971, June 25, Sunday. But the nakshatra was not Rōhiṇī nor did a solar eclipse occur on that day. If Āṅgirasa of the southern cycle is taken, then, the Śaka year would be 894 but the week-day and the nakshatra do not correspond. Nor was there a solar eclipse on that day. The only solar eclipse in that year occurred on October 22, Sunday, but on that day the nakshatra was not Rōhiṇī. In the previous year, however, a solar eclipse occurred on May 8th Sunday, when the nakshatra was Rōhiṇī. But the month was not Āshāḍha.

It records the death of Bīra-Nāgiyaṇa, son of Kuṇḍuṟara Eṟeyamma, in a cattleraid. Mārasiṅga was the nāḻgāvuṇḍa and Guttiya Gaṅga was governing Purigeṟe Three-hundred and Beḷvala Three-hundred. It is also stated that Vaṟeviṭa, the son of Kuṇḍuṟara Eṟeyamma died in a fight.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti koṭigadēva prithuvīrājyaṅgeye
guttiya gaṅga purigeṟe munuṟu

beḷvala munuṟumanaḷuttire munuṟakka mārasiṅga
nāḻgāvuṇḍu geye kuṇḍuṟareṟeyammana
maga bīra nāgiyaṇaṁ Aṇanaṇuṅga praje
mece gaṇḍa tuṟupariya māṇalāgade
ndu seragillade surigegiḻtiṟidu sattu śvargga
lāyakke sandaṁ sakavarṣa 893 Ā

ṅgira Eṁba saṁ
vatsarada Āṣāḍhada [A]māse [Ā]
dityavāra rōhiṇe nakṣatra sūryyagrahaṇa
Āndu nindudu I kalla kuṇḍuṟareṟeyammana magaṁ vaṟeviṭaṁ
Ālura haḻavinalu beḍakanoḍe kādi prajemmecegaṇḍaṁ vaṟeviṭa
magane Enisi ssattu salayakke sandaṁThere is space for one letter here, which is apparently rggā.
Eṟenāmma tammana mmaga tanna maga
lavovilla I dattiya nilisido
Digital edition of SII 18.33 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
